positive: A stylized, highly detailed representation of a majestic owl perched on an ethereal branch. The design features strong, contrasting silhouettes of the owl and branches against a deep midnight blue and glowing forest green gradient background. Use geometric patterns and minimalist tribal elements to outline the forms, giving it a modern, graphic tattoo art aesthetic. The composition should be perfectly centered and balanced, emphasizing clean lines and deep shadow play. The style must be vector-illustration quality, suitable for silkscreen printing on apparel, with crisp edges and a limited, impactful color palette.
negative: blurry, amateur, watermark, signature, text, logo, grainy, dirty, lowres, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy lines, low detail
